text:
There once was a girl named Mia who lived in a world filled with talking animals. Every morning, she met Chirpy outside her kitchen window. Chirpy would sing a lively song about dreams.

One day, Mia realized her dream was to become a talented singer. She entered a singing competition, amazed by every performer.

At first, she was shy. On the first night, she sang too softly. But Chirpy sang along passionately. Before Mia knew it, she was belting out those lovely songs.

In the final round, Mia opened up. She poured out her heart, her passion for music. The crowd went wild. Mia won the competition!

From then on, Mia sang every day. Every bird she met would join in her song. She toured the world, filling arenas with her songs. Chirpy flew everywhere with her, cheering her on.

Mia became famous, and they all lived happily ever after. Every year, at the birthday party, they'd
